title: Agra, Uttar Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Agra, Uttar Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Agra is a city in Uttar Pradesh with a population of 1,760,000. Home to the iconic Taj Mahal, a UNESCO World Heritage city on the Yamuna River with Mughal gardens and historic monuments.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
